name: Fresh Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
For Pastry: Process first four ingredients in a food processor. Add butter and shortening, cutting with on/off turns until mixture resembles coarse meal. Incorporate enough ice water to form moist clumps. Form dough into a ball. Divide into two halves. Flatten each half into disks. Wrap in plastic wrap; chill at least 1 hour or overnight.
For Filling: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, mix 1 1/3 cups sugar, cornstarch, and lemon peel. Add raspberries and toss to combine. Roll out one disk of pastry on a lightly floured surface to form a 12-inch round. Transfer to a 9-inch glass pie dish with 1 1/4-inch high sides; trim edges. Roll out remaining dough to thickness of 1/8". Use for top crust. Place pie on a baking sheet. Bake until top is golden brown and juices bubble, about 1 hour. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
Sprinkle remaining sugar and cinnamon over the cooled pie.
